field: # CWB note status decode map for /sap-note-status.
# CWBNTSTAT (CWBNTCUST-NTSTATUS) and CWBPRSTAT (CWBNTCUST-PRSTATUS) are CHAR1 domains
# with NO fixed values (probed S4D+EC2 2026-07-11: DD01L VALEXI blank, DD07L empty) --
# SNOTE decodes them via program constants, not DDIC. This map is a curated best-effort
# decode; the RAW code is always shown alongside. confidence: DOCUMENTED (standard SNOTE
# status, stable across releases) | INFERRED (widely-used meaning, confirm in SNOTE) |
# UNKNOWN (meaning not asserted -- verdict stays raw). Customer-overridable.
